# Rokkit Icon Component

> Flexible icon component supporting icon fonts, emoji, and interactive roles.

The Icon component renders icons from icon fonts (like FontAwesome, Material Icons) or short text/emoji. It supports multiple roles including decorative, button, and checkbox behaviors.

## Quick Start

```svelte
<script>
  import { Icon } from '@rokkit/ui'
</script>

<!-- Icon font class -->
<Icon name="fa-solid fa-home" />

<!-- Short text/emoji (2 chars or less) -->
<Icon name="🏠" />
<Icon name="OK" />
```

## Core Concepts

### Icon Names

The component intelligently handles different icon formats:

```svelte
<!-- Icon font classes (3+ characters) -->
<Icon name="fa-solid fa-user" />
<Icon name="mdi mdi-account" />
<Icon name="lucide-home" />

<!-- Short text or emoji (≤2 characters) rendered as text -->
<Icon name="👍" />
<Icon name="A" />
<Icon name="12" />
```

### Roles

Icon supports multiple interactive roles:

```svelte
<!-- Decorative (default) - no interaction -->
<Icon name="info" role="img" />

<!-- Button - clickable -->
<Icon name="close" role="button" onclick={handleClose} />

<!-- Checkbox - toggleable -->
<Icon name="star" role="checkbox" bind:checked={isFavorite} />

<!-- Option - for use in selection lists -->
<Icon name="check" role="option" checked={isSelected} />
```

### State Icons

Icons can display different states:

```svelte
<Icon name="loading" state="loading" />
<Icon name="check" state="success" />
<Icon name="alert" state="error" />
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | `string` | `'?'` | Icon name/class or short text |
| `role` | `string` | `'img'` | Semantic role |
| `label` | `string` | `null` | Accessible label (aria-label) |
| `size` | `string` | `'base'` | Icon size |
| `state` | `string` | `null` | Visual state |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Disables interaction |
| `checked` | `boolean` | `undefined` | Checked state (checkbox/option) |
| `tabindex` | `number` | `0` | Tab index |
| `class` | `string` | `''` | CSS class names |
| `onclick` | `function` | `undefined` | Click handler |
| `onchange` | `function` | `undefined` | Change handler (checkbox) |
| `onmouseenter` | `function` | `undefined` | Mouse enter handler |
| `onmouseleave` | `function` | `undefined` | Mouse leave handler |

### Role Options

| Role | Behavior |
|------|----------|
| `'img'` | Decorative, no interaction (default) |
| `'button'` | Clickable, keyboard accessible |
| `'checkbox'` | Toggleable with checked state |
| `'option'` | For selection lists |

### Size Options

| Size | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `'xs'` | Extra small |
| `'sm'` | Small |
| `'base'` | Base size (default) |
| `'lg'` | Large |
| `'xl'` | Extra large |

## Component Structure

```
<icon>
├── <span>    // For short text (≤2 chars)
└── <i>       // For icon font classes (>2 chars)
</icon>
```

## Data Attributes for Styling

| Attribute | Element | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|---------|
| `data-tag-icon` | icon | Main element |
| `data-tag-button` | icon | When role="button" |
| `data-tag-checkbox` | icon | When role="checkbox/option" |
| `data-state` | icon | Current state |
| `data-size` | icon | Size value |
| `data-disabled` | icon | Disabled state |

### Styling Example

```css
[data-tag-icon] {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

[data-tag-icon][data-size="xs"] { font-size: 0.75rem; }
[data-tag-icon][data-size="sm"] { font-size: 0.875rem; }
[data-tag-icon][data-size="base"] { font-size: 1rem; }
[data-tag-icon][data-size="lg"] { font-size: 1.25rem; }
[data-tag-icon][data-size="xl"] { font-size: 1.5rem; }

[data-tag-button] {
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: transform 0.1s;
}

[data-tag-button]:hover {
  transform: scale(1.1);
}

[data-tag-button]:active {
  transform: scale(0.95);
}

[data-tag-checkbox][aria-checked="true"] {
  color: var(--primary-500);
}

[data-tag-icon][data-disabled="true"] {
  opacity: 0.5;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}

[data-tag-icon][data-state="loading"] {
  animation: spin 1s linear infinite;
}

[data-tag-icon][data-state="success"] {
  color: var(--success-500);
}

[data-tag-icon][data-state="error"] {
  color: var(--error-500);
}
```

## Accessibility

- `role` attribute set based on prop
- `aria-label` from label or name prop
- `aria-checked` for checkbox/option roles
- Keyboard support (Enter to activate)
- `tabindex` management based on role

## Import

```javascript
// Named import
import { Icon } from '@rokkit/ui'

// Default import
import Icon from '@rokkit/ui/icon'
```

## TypeScript Types

```typescript
interface IconProps {
  name?: string
  role?: 'img' | 'button' | 'checkbox' | 'option'
  label?: string
  size?: 'xs' | 'sm' | 'base' | 'lg' | 'xl'
  state?: string
  disabled?: boolean
  checked?: boolean
  tabindex?: number
  class?: string
  onclick?: () => void
  onchange?: (checked: boolean) => void
  onmouseenter?: (event: MouseEvent) => void
  onmouseleave?: (event: MouseEvent) => void
}
```

## Examples

### Basic Icons

```svelte
<script>
  import { Icon } from '@rokkit/ui'
</script>

<Icon name="fa-solid fa-home" />
<Icon name="fa-solid fa-user" />
<Icon name="fa-solid fa-cog" />
```

### Different Sizes

```svelte
<script>
  import { Icon } from '@rokkit/ui'
</script>

<Icon name="star" size="xs" />
<Icon name="star" size="sm" />
<Icon name="star" size="base" />
<Icon name="star" size="lg" />
<Icon name="star" size="xl" />
```

### Button Icons

```svelte
<script>
  import { Icon } from '@rokkit/ui'

  function handleClose() {
    console.log('Close clicked')
  }
</script>

<Icon name="close" role="button" label="Close" onclick={handleClose} />
<Icon name="edit" role="button" label="Edit" onclick={handleEdit} />
<Icon name="delete" role="button" label="Delete" onclick={handleDelete} />
```

### Checkbox Icons

```svelte
<script>
  import { Icon } from '@rokkit/ui'

  let isFavorite = $state(false)
  let isBookmarked = $state(true)
</script>

<Icon
  name={isFavorite ? 'star-filled' : 'star-outline'}
  role="checkbox"
  label="Favorite"
  bind:checked={isFavorite}
/>

<Icon
  name={isBookmarked ? 'bookmark-filled' : 'bookmark-outline'}
  role="checkbox"
  label="Bookmark"
  bind:checked={isBookmarked}
/>
```

### Emoji Icons

```svelte
<script>
  import { Icon } from '@rokkit/ui'
</script>

<Icon name="👍" label="Thumbs up" />
<Icon name="❤️" label="Heart" />
<Icon name="🔥" label="Fire" />
```

### State Icons

```svelte
<script>
  import { Icon } from '@rokkit/ui'
</script>

<Icon name="spinner" state="loading" />
<Icon name="check-circle" state="success" />
<Icon name="alert-circle" state="error" />
<Icon name="info-circle" state="info" />
```

### With Hover Effects

```svelte
<script>
  import { Icon } from '@rokkit/ui'

  let isHovered = $state(false)
</script>

<Icon
  name={isHovered ? 'heart-filled' : 'heart-outline'}
  role="button"
  onmouseenter={() => isHovered = true}
  onmouseleave={() => isHovered = false}
  onclick={handleLike}
/>
```

### Disabled Icons

```svelte
<script>
  import { Icon } from '@rokkit/ui'
</script>

<Icon name="edit" role="button" disabled />
<Icon name="delete" role="button" disabled />
```

## Icon Libraries

Rokkit Icon works with any icon font library:

### FontAwesome
```svelte
<Icon name="fa-solid fa-home" />
<Icon name="fa-regular fa-heart" />
<Icon name="fa-brands fa-github" />
```

### Material Design Icons
```svelte
<Icon name="mdi mdi-home" />
<Icon name="mdi mdi-account" />
```

### Lucide
```svelte
<Icon name="lucide-home" />
<Icon name="lucide-user" />
```

## Related Components

- **Button** - Uses Icon for button icons
- **Rating** - Uses Icon for star ratings
- **CheckBox** - Alternative checkbox component
- **Item** - Uses Icon for list item icons
